subject: 77% of your next client already checked your reviews

opening: 77% of B2B buyers check reviews before they reach out, and a prospect weighing your agency does the same: they Google you, scan your reviews, and read page one. A bad review or an old client dispute sitting there quietly loses you pitches you never even hear about.
